heading: API Keys
subtitle: Manage client API keys for this tenant. The plaintext key is shown once on creation and cannot be retrieved afterwards.

allowedModels.label: Allowed Models (optional)
allowedModels.empty: No models available. Leave empty to allow all models.

modal.revokeConfirm: Revoke API key "{keyId}"? This cannot be undone.

plaintext.warning: This is the only time the full API key is shown. Copy it now — it cannot be retrieved later.

actions.emptyState: No API keys yet. Click "Create Key" to issue one.
